sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ‘China’s Netflix’ looks for stardom in new theme park business
feed.summary: iQiyi (IQ.US), often called "China's Netflix," is diversifying its revenue streams by launching a series of small-scale, immersive theme parks based on its streaming content. This move comes after seven quarters of declining revenue and aims to leverage its intellectual property in the growing experiential consumption market, following similar ventures by companies like Pop Mart, Miniso, and Netflix. While these parks are much smaller and cheaper to operate than traditional theme parks, iQiyi hopes they will attract new customers and boost its membership services.

feed.title: Edison Is Slashing Top Executive Bonuses After Deadly LA Fire
feed.summary: Edison International is reducing top executive bonuses by 40% following the deadly Eaton Fire in January 2025 that killed 19 people and destroyed over 10,000 structures in the Los Angeles area. CEO Pedro Pizarro and other senior executives will see their bonuses cut, and the company is also improving its wildfire compensation program to offer stronger support for displaced renters and better cover legal fees. This decision comes as the company faces lawsuits and awaits a state report on how wildfire mitigation costs should be distributed in California.

feed.title: Arista Networks’ Duda sells shares worth $4.5 million
feed.summary: Kenneth Duda, President and CTO of Arista Networks, sold $4.5 million worth of common stock on February 17, 2026, at prices between $141.1477 and $144.74. These sales were made directly, through a foundation, and a children's trust, following the exercise of options to acquire shares. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations, and revised its fiscal 2026 revenue guidance upward, though analyst reports indicate the stock may be overvalued.

feed.title: Quanta Services forecasts 2026 profit above estimates on strong AI data center-led demand
feed.summary: Quanta Services has projected its 2026 profit to exceed Wall Street estimates, driven by strong demand from AI data center infrastructure investments. The company's CEO highlighted significant opportunities arising from the convergence of various industries and robust electricity and infrastructure needs. Quanta also reported better-than-expected adjusted profit and revenue for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: Aristocrat expects to book US$32mln in legal cost recovery after litigation vs Light & Wonder : Croker
feed.summary: Aristocrat Leisure Ltd expects to recover approximately US$31.7 million (AUD45 million) in legal costs from its US$127.5 million intellectual-property settlement with Light & Wonder Inc. This was announced by CEO Trevor Croker at the firm's AGM, where he also outlined growth opportunities in gaming markets, new market entries like the UAE, and strategic acquisitions to enhance technology and AI capabilities. The company is committed to proactively defending its intellectual property.

feed.title: Kyndryl launches Cyber Defense Operations Center to unify network and security operations
feed.summary: Kyndryl Holdings Inc. has launched its Cyber Defense Operations Center in Bengaluru, India, to integrate network and security operations for global customers. This center aims to accelerate incident response and enhance IT performance amid rising AI-driven cyber risks and IT complexity. It offers AI-enabled assessments, role-based operational dashboards, and automated end-to-end operations, all integrated with Kyndryl Bridge, to provide unified visibility and improve resilience.

feed.title: L3Harris THAAD Contract Adds Context To Valuation And Momentum Story
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies secured a nearly $400 million contract to supply components for the Missile Defense Agency's THAAD system, reinforcing its role in missile defense. This contract adds context to the company's valuation, which is currently near estimated fair value, and highlights recent positive momentum with stock gains of 17.8% year to date. Investors should consider overall defense spending trends and the company's debt levels when assessing future performance.

feed.title: Constellation Completes Calpine Transaction, Powering America's Clean Energy Future
feed.summary: Constellation announced it has completed its acquisition of Calpine Corporation from Energy Capital Partners, creating the nation's largest producer of electricity. This combination unites Constellation's nuclear fleet with Calpine's natural gas and geothermal generation to deliver reliable, clean power and strengthen the U.S.'s energy leadership. The merged company will serve 2.5 million retail and business customers nationwide and aims to drive innovation in clean technologies.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Phillip Creek Sells Shares of M/I Homes Inc (MHO)
feed.summary: Phillip Creek, the former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of a branch of M/I Homes Inc (MHO), sold 1,805 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. This transaction leaves him with 33,123 shares. M/I Homes Inc is currently trading at $145.5 per share, with a market capitalization of $3.702 billion and a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.1, indicating it is fairly valued.

feed.title: Genius Sports Defends $1.2 Billion Legend Acquisition as "Participation Layer" Strategy
feed.summary: Genius Sports CEO Mark Locke defended the company's $1.2 billion acquisition of Legend, a global digital sports and iGaming media network, addressing market skepticism regarding its valuation. Locke framed the acquisition not as a traditional "affiliate" business but as an infrastructure expansion into the "participation layer" of modern sport, connecting Genius's official data rights with a massive audience. The deal is expected to be immediately accretive to adjusted EBITDA margins and free cash flow, with projected combined revenue of $1.1 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $320 million to $330 million on a 2026 pro forma basis.

feed.title: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. Announces Disposition Of Simonette Assets
feed.summary: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. announced the disposition of its Simonette assets. The news comes from Reuters and was reported by Refinitiv. This is a brief announcement concerning mergers and acquisitions (M&A) activities for the company.

feed.title: New Azerbaijan oil pact gives Gran Tierra 65% stake in 0.4M acres
feed.summary: Gran Tierra Energy has signed an exploration, development, and production sharing agreement (EDPSA) with SOCAR for the Guba-Khazaryani contract area in Azerbaijan, securing a 65% working interest and operatorship over approximately 0.4 million gross acres. The agreement features a five-year exploration/appraisal term and a 25-year development term, with initial activities in 2026 and 2027 to be funded by forecasted operating cash. This move adds a significant new exploration opportunity to Gran Tierra’s portfolio and is subject to legislative and legal approvals.

feed.title: TD Cowen downgrades PPL (PPL) to a Hold
feed.summary: TD Cowen has downgraded PPL (PPL) to a Hold rating, setting a price target on February 17th. This comes as the analyst consensus on PPL remains a Moderate Buy with an average price target of $39.80. The company recently reported quarterly revenue of $2.24 billion and a net profit of $318 million.

feed.title: LKQ CORP SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation has released its annual 10-K report, detailing a decrease in total revenue, operating income, and net income for the fiscal year, with diluted EPS falling to $2.35. The company is exploring the potential sale of its Specialty segment and conducting a comprehensive review of strategic alternatives to enhance shareholder value, including a potential sale of the entire company. Key challenges include geopolitical risks, intense competition, and economic conditions, which the company aims to address through strategic initiatives and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Is Coca-Cola Still the Ultimate Dividend Stock to Buy Now and Hold Forever?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola continues its streak as a Dividend King, having just raised its dividend for the 64th consecutive year, making it an attractive stock for passive income. While its share price growth has been modest, the company's strong brand, consistent cash flow, and minimal disruption risk make it a predictable and safe long-term holding. However, investors seeking market-beating returns should temper their expectations due to its mature growth stage.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) director Rees sells $486,880 in shares
feed.summary: Joanna Rees, a director at Fair Isaac (FICO), sold 358 shares of common stock for a total of $486,880 on February 13, 2026, while also exercising options to acquire an equal number of shares for $140,182. This insider transaction follows Fair Isaac's strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, which exceeded analyst expectations, though the stock saw a slight decline in after-hours trading. BofA Securities also reinstated its "Buy" rating for FICO, citing the company's pricing power and the strength of its FICO Score product.

feed.title: First Trust Senior Floating Rate Income Fund II Declares its Monthly Common Share Distribution of $0.097 Per Share for March
feed.summary: First Trust Senior Floating Rate Income Fund II (FCT) has declared a monthly common share distribution of $0.097 per share, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. This distribution reflects a rate of 11.58% based on NAV and 11.66% based on market price as of February 18, 2026, and is composed of net investment income, return of capital, and potentially net short-term realized capital gains. The Fund's primary objective is to seek a high level of current income, primarily investing in senior secured floating-rate corporate loans, with a secondary objective of capital preservation.

feed.title: MFA Financial, Inc. Announces First Quarter Dividends on Series B Preferred Stock and Series C Preferred Stock
feed.summary: MFA Financial, Inc. announced the declaration of first-quarter dividends for both its 7.50% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock and its 6.50% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. Shareholders of record by March 4, 2026, will receive these dividends on March 31, 2026. The dividend for Series C Preferred Stock was determined based on a rate linked to three-month CME Term SOFR plus a spread adjustment.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. (TMUS) Completes €2.5 Billion Senior Notes Off
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (TMUS) has successfully completed a public offering of senior notes, raising €2.5 billion. This offering, consisting of three tranches with varying interest rates and maturity dates, is intended to bolster the company's financial flexibility. The proceeds will be allocated for general corporate purposes, including share repurchases, dividend payments, and debt refinancing.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) CAO Sells $1,867,645.74 in Stock
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand's Chief Accounting Officer, Michael Scheske, sold 19,122 shares of the company's stock for over $1.8 million, reducing his stake by 61.14%. This insider sale comes amidst mixed analyst ratings (consensus "Hold") and a consensus price target of $101.86, despite the company beating Q4 earnings expectations and providing strong FY 2026 guidance. The large insider sell-off might weigh on investor sentiment, even though the company shows positive financial performance.

feed.title: IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX) EVP Sells $3,369,657.98 in Stock
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories' (NASDAQ:IDXX) EVP Michael Erickson sold 5,371 shares of company stock for over $3.36 million, reducing his ownership by nearly 30%. This sale follows the company reporting slightly missed EPS but increased revenue, and providing full-year 2026 guidance. IDEXX currently holds a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus with a target price of $783.33.

feed.title: Mayur Kapani Sells 15,213 Shares of Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) Stock
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) CTO Mayur Kapani recently sold 15,213 shares of company stock for approximately $2.36 million, reducing his ownership by 19%. The sale occurred on February 18th at an average price of $155.02 per share. This follows another sale made on December 8th, and comes after the company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Hilton Worldwide (NYSE:HLT) Insider Sells 114,289 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide insider Christopher Nassetta sold 114,289 shares of NYSE:HLT stock valued at over $36 million on February 17th, significantly reducing his stake by 75.82%. The sale occurred shortly after Hilton reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings are generally positive, with an average target price of $321.24.

feed.title: Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) Director Sells 155 Shares
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software director Michael Sheresky sold 155 shares of the company's stock for a total of $30,183.15, reducing his direct ownership to 65,626 shares. The company's stock traded up on Thursday, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for TTWO with a target price of $283.94.

feed.title: Bear of the Day: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM)
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) has been designated as a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) due to a recent earnings miss, indicating a potential top to its stock rally. The company reported a 17% EPS miss in Q4, and its 2026 guidance shows slowing aggregate shipment growth and revenue below consensus, influenced by weakness in single-family housing and nonresidential construction. Earnings estimates have subsequently been lowered across all time frames, suggesting a challenging risk/reward profile for investors.

feed.title: NASA boss rips agency, Boeing over Starliner mission that left astronauts stranded in space
feed.summary: NASA's new administrator criticized both Boeing and the space agency for their management of the troubled Starliner mission, which resulted in two astronauts being stranded on the International Space Station for an extended period. This condemnation follows the release of a 300-page report detailing technical issues with the spacecraft.

feed.title: Marsh & McLennan Companies (MRSH) Announces $600 Million Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Marsh & McLennan Companies (MRSH) has announced a $600 million offering of 4.950% Senior Notes due 2036. This strategic financial move, executed through an underwriting agreement with Citigroup, J.P. Morgan Securities, and Wells Fargo Securities, aims to strengthen the company's capital structure and enhance liquidity. The issuance, completed on February 19, 2026, is expected to support Marsh & McLennan's long-term growth objectives and maintain its competitive market edge.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in PayPal Holdings, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - PYPL
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) following disappointing Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 earnings, the departure of CEO Alex Chriss, and the withdrawal of 2027 financial targets. Investors who purchased PayPal securities during the Class Period are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff appointment by April 20, 2026. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud or other unlawful business practices by PayPal and its officers/directors.

feed.title: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Boston Scientific Corporation - BSX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) following a significant drop in its stock price. This investigation stems from the company's release of fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, which showed lower-than-expected sales in its electrophysiology division. On February 4, 2026, Boston Scientific's stock fell by $16.12 per share, or 17.6%, closing at $75.50.

feed.title: IDACORP Reports Strong 2025 Growth, Sets Bullish 2026 Outlook on Infrastructure Expansion
feed.summary: IDACORP announced strong financial results for 2025, with increased fourth-quarter and full-year earnings driven by customer growth and rate adjustments. The company also provided an optimistic earnings forecast for 2026, supported by a significant multi-year investment in infrastructure, including new transmission lines and renewable energy projects. These capital expenditures are expected to more than double the average annual spending of the previous five years.

feed.title: GATX Corporation (NYSE:GATX) Increases Dividend to $0.66 Per Share
feed.summary: GATX Corporation (NYSE:GATX) recently declared an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.66 per share, an 8.2% raise from its previous dividend of $0.61. This marks the 15th consecutive year the company has increased its dividend, which is well-covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 25.4%. GATX also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for EPS and revenue, and provided optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance, maintaining a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Galapagos Adds Industry Veteran Paulo Fontoura to Board as Independent Director
feed.summary: Galapagos has appointed Dr. Paulo Fontoura as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective February 9, 2026, succeeding Dr. Susanne Schaffert. Dr. Fontoura brings extensive pharmaceutical leadership experience from Roche, and his appointment is expected to bolster Galapagos' strategic oversight as it advances innovative medicines and business development. Analysts currently rate GLPG stock as a Sell with a $22.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a Neutral rating due to challenging financial and operational landscapes despite a strong cash position.

feed.title: Green Plains CEO in BofA 2026 ag conference fireside chat
feed.summary: Green Plains Inc. announced that CEO Chris Osowski will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 26. The company will also hold meetings with institutional investors. A live webcast and replay of the event will be available on Green Plains' investor relations website.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on These Real Estate Stocks: BrightSpire Capital (BRSP), Jones Lang Lasalle (JLL)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish sentiments on real estate stocks BrightSpire Capital (BRSP) and Jones Lang Lasalle (JLL). Gaurav Mehta from Alliance Global Partners maintained a Buy rating on BrightSpire Capital with a $6.50 price target. Stephen Sheldon from William Blair reiterated a Buy rating on Jones Lang Lasalle, which has a "Strong Buy" analyst consensus and a $395.50 price target.

feed.title: Gold Royalty Announces Amended and Upsized Revolving Credit Facility of up to US$150 Million at Reduced Interest Cost and Provides an Update on Selected Portfolio Assets
feed.summary: Gold Royalty Corp. has announced an amended and upsized revolving credit facility of up to US$150 million with a syndicate of banks, featuring a reduced interest rate. The company also provided positive progress updates from operators of assets on which it holds royalties or streams, highlighting significant development and expected revenue growth from cornerstone assets in 2026 and the medium-term. This increased facility and operational progress position Gold Royalty to efficiently execute its growth strategy.

feed.title: Jeffrey Sprecher, ice ceo, sells $43.4 million in stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey Sprecher, CEO of Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), sold approximately $43.4 million worth of company stock on February 18, 2026, and an additional $983,576 on February 17, as part of a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite these sales, Sprecher retains a significant ownership stake in ICE, which has an $87.5 billion valuation and a strong track record of dividend increases and analyst upgrades. The article also highlights ICE's recent robust Q4 2025 earnings, record interest rate derivatives activity, and new cryptocurrency futures offerings.

feed.title: Ellen Siminoff Sells 413 Shares of Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) Stock
feed.summary: Ellen Siminoff, a Director at Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO), sold 413 shares of the company's stock on February 18th at an average price of $200, totaling $82,600. This transaction reduced her stake by 15.3% to 2,286 shares. The video game publisher's stock traded up 1.1% to $201.37, with a market cap of $37.29 billion, and analysts generally rate it as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $283.94.

feed.title: Elizabeth Meloy Hepding Sells 18,246 Shares of Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Stock
feed.summary: Elizabeth Meloy Hepding, an insider at Ingersoll Rand, sold 18,246 shares of the company's stock for approximately $1.77 million, reducing her stake by over 52%. This transaction occurred despite Ingersoll Rand's strong Q4 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations, and positive FY 2026 guidance. However, significant insider selling, including by EVP Vicente Reynal, has negatively impacted market sentiment.

feed.title: Sophie Vandebroek Sells 1,464 Shares of IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX) Stock
feed.summary: Sophie Vandebroek, a director at IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX), sold 1,464 shares for approximately $920,300, reducing her stake by 69.32%. This sale occurred on February 17th at an average price of $628.62 per share. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $2.92, slightly missing consensus, with revenue of $1.09 billion and provided FY2026 EPS guidance between $14.29 and $14.80.

feed.title: Middle East Tensions Drive Oil Prices Up, Sending American Airlines, Delta, and JetBlue Fares Soaring – Are You Ready for the Price Hike?
feed.summary: Escalating tensions in the Middle East are causing oil prices to surge to a seven-month high, putting significant pressure on airline stocks like American Airlines, Delta, and JetBlue. This increase in fuel costs is threatening airline profit margins and operational expenses, potentially leading to higher ticket prices for consumers and creating a volatile environment for investors. Airlines are grappling with managing these rising costs amid geopolitical instability and other financial pressures while the market monitors the situation for further impacts on the industry's profitability and traveler demand.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Disc Medicine (NASDAQ:IRON) CFO Sells $256,154.50 in Stock
feed.summary: Disc Medicine's CFO, Jean Franchi, sold 4,075 shares of company stock for a total of $256,154.50 on February 17th, reducing her stake by nearly 5%. This sale occurred amidst mixed market sentiment for IRON, including an FDA denial of fast-track designation for their lead drug bitopertin, which will extend approval timelines, and analyst price target adjustments. Despite some negative developments, institutional investors have shown strong buying interest in the company.

feed.title: State Street Corporation Declares Dividends on its Common Stock and Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series “G,” “I,” “J,” and “K”
feed.summary: State Street Corporation announced quarterly cash dividends for its common stock and several series of non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock. Common shareholders will receive $0.84 per share, payable on April 13, 2026. Dividends were also declared for Series G, I, J, and K preferred stocks, with varying per share and depositary share amounts, all payable on March 16, 2026.

feed.title: ROSEN, A LEADING INVESTOR RIGHTS LAW FIRM, Encourages PayPal Holdings, Inc. Investors to Secure ...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal provided investors with materially false and misleading statements regarding its financial targets and growth potential for its "Branded Checkout" segment, concealing adverse facts about the salesforce's ability to capitalize on perceived growth. Investors are encouraged to join the class action by April 20, 2026, to potentially recover damages.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Kober Sells Shares of MACOM Technology Soluti
feed.summary: John Kober, Senior Vice President and CFO of MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings Inc (MTSI), sold 7,196 shares of the company on February 17, 2026. This transaction brings his total ownership to 48,508 shares. The company's stock, trading at $243.07, is considered significantly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $148.06, with a high price-to-earnings ratio compared to the industry median.

feed.title: BofA Reinstates Fair Isaac (FICO) Coverage With Buy Rating, $1,900 PT Citing Strong Pricing Power
feed.summary: Bank of America (BofA) has reinstated coverage of Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) with a Buy rating and a $1,900 price target, citing the company’s strong pricing power and the growth potential of its Mortgage Direct Licensing program. This move is part of BofA's broader constructive outlook on the Information and Business Services sector, projecting healthy performance for 2026. Goldman Sachs also maintains a Buy rating, highlighting strong Q1 2026 results, upcoming price increases, and wider adoption of FICO 10T as drivers for future EPS growth.

feed.title: Commissioners approve 14-year extension for Mosaic's at Four Corners
feed.summary: Manatee County Commissioners have approved a 14-year extension to Mosaic's Master Mining Plan for its Four Corners Mine, a decision reached after a relatively uneventful hearing. The extension, which will allow mining until 2044 and reclamation until 2055, is expected to bring benefits such as reduced trucking traffic and expedited reclamation in certain areas. Despite some opposition due to environmental concerns, the commissioners voted 5-2 in favor, recognizing Mosaic's economic contributions and commitments to accelerated land reclamation.

feed.title: Vectra AI Highlights Gartner Research on Next-Generation NDR and AI-Driven Threats
feed.summary: Vectra AI is leveraging recent Gartner research on next-generation Network Detection and Response (NDR) to address the escalating threat of AI-driven cyberattacks. The company highlights the need for proactive, preemptive defense strategies and unified visibility across various environments. This strategic alignment with Gartner's insights aims to strengthen Vectra AI's competitive standing in the cybersecurity market, particularly for customers with complex hybrid infrastructures seeking machine-speed response and autonomous defense.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Announces Positive Phase 3b Results for Taltz and Zepbound Combination Treatment in Psoriasis and Obesity
feed.summary: Eli Lilly announced positive Phase 3b results for the combination treatment of Taltz (ixekizumab) and Zepbound (tirzepatide) for adults with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis and obesity. The study showed that 27.1% of participants achieved both complete skin clearance and at least 10% weight loss with the combination, significantly outperforming Taltz alone. This marks Taltz as the first psoriatic biologic to successfully address psoriasis in conjunction with obesity using an incretin therapy, suggesting that treating obesity can improve psoriasis outcomes.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma brand adds 3 Naturepedic mattresses to sustainable home lineup
feed.summary: Naturepedic has partnered with Williams-Sonoma's sustainable home outlet, GreenRow, to offer three GOTS-certified organic mattresses. This partnership includes an exclusive Aurora mattress for GreenRow, as well as the Serenade hybrid and Naturepedic's organic crib mattress. GreenRow, launched in 2023, focuses on sustainable materials and manufacturing, reflecting growing consumer demand for transparent and healthier home products.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Arista Networks (ANET) PT to $165 Following Q4 2025 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for Arista Networks (ANET) to $165 from $159, maintaining an Overweight rating, after the company's strong Q4 2025 earnings beat. This decision was influenced by a significant increase in deferred revenue and steady gross margin guidance despite memory market challenges, along with raised AI and growth targets. Another analyst, Amit Daryanani of Evercore ISI, also increased his price target to $200 with an Outperform rating, citing robust guidance and an increased 2026 revenue growth target.
